bodyText: PULAR PARA O CONTEÚDO PRINCIPAL PULAR PARA O RODAPÉ Acesse behance.net Explorar Carreiras Recursos Contratar Experimente grátis Fazer logon Acesse adobe.com Seguir Mensagem Ferramentas Salvar Compartilhar Curtir Queenia Modern & Elegant Serif Font Serif&Soul Design • Seguir Queenia Modern & Elegant Serif Font Queenia is a modern serif typeface that exudes an elegant and sophisticated feminine vibe. Its letterform structure showcases graceful curves and refined serifs, creating a luxurious and stylish aesthetic. This font is particularly well-suited for branding in the beauty and cosmetic industries, high-end fashion magazines seeking a touch of modern elegance, and lifestyle blogs aiming for a sophisticated visual identity.
